purpose: Route agents-stack harness requests to the correct workflow phase, then dispatch that child as a fresh worker instead of doing the phase inline in the orchestrator.
selection_order: Initialize missing or unusable live state before any sprint routing.
If a single active sprint exists, resume it from the strongest durable artifact before proposing new work.
When review or contradictory state is not yet reconciled, prefer state-update over new execution.
Choose the narrowest phase child that matches the current artifact gate.
After selecting a child, dispatch a fresh worker, sub-agent, Task agent, or equivalent runtime delegate with phase-scoped tools and explicit artifact targets.
Do not load the child prompt into the orchestrator context and continue inline.

children.name: project-initializer
children.summary: Dispatches a fresh initializer worker to bootstrap durable live and reference state when the repository cannot yet support honest sprint routing.
route_when: `docs/live/features.json` is missing, empty, unparsable, or lacks durable backlog truth.
The repository follows the agents-stack layout but has no trustworthy live state for selecting or resuming work.
avoid_when: A single active sprint already exists and should be resumed instead.
Durable live state already names pending or active work.

install_if_missing.notes: Install the nested child path before routing if the runtime cannot discover bundled children automatically, then dispatch it as a fresh worker.

children.name: generator-proposal
children.summary: Dispatches a fresh proposal worker to turn one backlog item into the next bounded sprint proposal when no approved contract exists yet.
route_when: Exactly one pending backlog item should become the next active sprint and no approved contract exists yet.
Live state is trustworthy, but the active feature has no local sprint proposal or the proposal was explicitly reset.
avoid_when: `sprint_proposal.md` already exists and still needs contract review.
`contract.md`, `handoff.md`, or `review.md` already exists for the active sprint.

install_if_missing.notes: Install the nested child path before routing if the runtime cannot discover bundled children automatically, then dispatch it as a fresh worker.

children.name: evaluator-contract-review
children.summary: Dispatches a fresh contract-review worker to independently approve or reject a sprint proposal before any implementation begins.
route_when: `status.json.resume_from` points to `sprint_proposal.md` after an interrupted proposal-review pass.
avoid_when: `contract.md`, `handoff.md`, or `review.md` already represents a later phase.

install_if_missing.notes: Install the nested child path before routing if the runtime cannot discover bundled children automatically, then dispatch it as a fresh worker.

children.name: generator-execution
children.summary: Dispatches a fresh execution worker to implement the approved contract or retry the same sprint after a reconciled failed review.
route_when: `.harness/<feature>/contract.md` exists and no later handoff/review gate is waiting.
Local and live state already reconcile a failed review into `review_failed`, so the same sprint must be retried from `review.md`.
`status.json` shows `contracted`, `in_progress`, or `review_failed` and the local files agree.
avoid_when: The proposal is not approved yet.
`handoff.md` exists and independent review has not happened yet.
`review.md` exists but local and live state do not yet agree on the outcome.

install_if_missing.notes: Install the nested child path before routing if the runtime cannot discover bundled children automatically, then dispatch it as a fresh worker.

children.name: adversarial-live-review
children.summary: Dispatches a fresh review worker to run the independent PASS/FAIL/BLOCKED review once execution leaves a reproducible handoff.
route_when: `handoff.md` and `runtime.md` exist and the work is ready for independent review.
avoid_when: Implementation is still blocked or has not produced a truthful handoff.
`review.md` already exists and has not been reconciled.

install_if_missing.notes: Install the nested child path before routing if the runtime cannot discover bundled children automatically, then dispatch it as a fresh worker.

children.name: state-update
children.summary: Dispatches a fresh state-update worker to reconcile review outcomes or contradictory state into durable live truth and archive history.
route_when: `review.md` exists and the outcome has not yet been reconciled into live state.
`status.json` is `blocked` and the blocker has not yet been published or reconciled in live state, or active/live state contradict each other.
A passed sprint must be archived or a failed sprint must be reopened truthfully.
avoid_when: No review or contradiction exists and an earlier phase still owns the sprint.
The repository is merely uninitialized and needs bootstrap, not reconciliation.
The sprint is already blocked and the blocker is fully reflected in local and live state; surface the blocked state instead of dispatching another state-update worker.

install_if_missing.notes: Install the nested child path before routing if the runtime cannot discover bundled children automatically, then dispatch it as a fresh worker.
